name: GolfSmart - Indoor Golf Training and Practice Facility
address: Calliope Shopping Center, 14520 Memorial Dr Suite 95, Houston, TX 77079
about: GolfSmart is an indoor golf training facility established in 2000, specializing in personalized coaching using advanced technology. The facility features 7,000 square feet of space with 12 hitting bays, equipped with Trackman and Flightscope launch monitors, V1 slow-motion video software, and a 1,000 sq. ft. putting and chipping green. Instruction focuses on individual swing analysis and development, with lessons tailored to each golfer's specific strengths and limitations. The venue offers various programs including group lessons, junior camps, and special packages like the Executive Lunch Special.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced swing analysis with Trackman and V1 slow-motion video
Personalized coaching tailored to individual swing mechanics
Climate-controlled facility with 1,000 sq. ft. putting and chipping green
Group lessons offer one-on-one time in intimate class sizes
Video summaries of lessons sent for reinforcement and 24/7 online access

food_and_drink.notes: Box lunches included with Executive Lunch Special; available for purchase otherwise

simulator_hardware.notes: Professional-grade launch monitor used for swing analysis
Doppler radar launch monitor for ball flight analysis

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, GolfSmart provides complimentary club and ball rentals if needed.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: Food is available for purchase with the Executive Lunch Special; no alcohol is mentioned as being available.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: The website does not specify a time frame for 18-hole sessions; pricing is typically per hour.

faq.question: Is GolfSmart kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GolfSmart offers junior golf lessons, summer camps, and programs tailored for young golfers.
